hero.title: Perfect Your Dough Every Time
hero.subtitle: Build consistent sourdough and pizza formulas for your bakery while showcasing a polished QA-ready product.

artisan.title: Artisan Sourdough & Pizza Philosophy
artisan.description: At VATRA URBANĂ we combine long fermentation, clean ingredients, and modern workflow discipline to deliver handcrafted products with consistent quality.
artisan.breadText: Our loaves are naturally leavened, slowly proofed, and baked for deep flavor, crisp crust, and an open, tender crumb.
artisan.pizzaText: Our pizza dough is matured for balance and digestibility, then baked to achieve a light interior and a refined, crispy edge.

products.name: Country Sourdough Loaf
products.description: Long fermentation, crisp crust, and soft open crumb.

products.name: Wood-Fired Margherita
products.description: Classic tomato, mozzarella, and basil on artisan dough.

products.name: Seeded Rye Bread
products.description: Nutty flavor profile with hearty grains and seeds.

products.name: Roman Pizza Slice
products.description: Crispy base with seasonal toppings, perfect on-the-go.

products.name: Focaccia al Rosmarino
products.description: Olive oil rich, airy crumb, topped with rosemary and sea salt.

home.footerMessage: Fresh bread, warm pizza, and a welcoming neighborhood bakery experience.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: VATRA URBANĂ is a modern urban bakery concept built around premium sourdough and pizza products, with a strong focus on consistency, hospitality, and operational clarity.

values.title: Artisan Craft
values.description: We combine traditional sourdough fermentation with modern consistency so every loaf and pizza base feels handcrafted.

values.title: Local Community
values.description: VATRA URBANĂ is designed as a neighborhood bakery where people gather for fresh bread, warm slices, and honest ingredients.

values.title: Quality First
values.description: From flour selection to hydration precision, we focus on repeatable quality to support both business growth and customer trust.

shop.title: Shop
shop.intro: Explore signature bakery products curated for daily retail and catering-ready orders.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Get in touch for wholesale, collaborations, catering, or interview-demo feedback.

calculator.title: VATRA URBANĂ
calculator.subtitle: Dedicated dough planning tool for your bakery operations and QA showcase.
